```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-size:0.8em;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.4em;line-height:1.4;">
  Cram every tool, instruction, parameter into the context →
 </div>
 <div style="font-size:0.95em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.2em;line-height:1.2;">
  attention disperses.
 </div>

 <div style="position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:7em;height:7em;">
  <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed #F2B5A8;animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;"></div>
  <div style="position:absolute;inset:1.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed #F2B5A8;opacity:0.6;"></div>
  <div style="position:relative;width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.7em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;border:1.5px solid #F2B5A8;box-shadow:0 0 32px rgba(212,95,71,0.3);"><i data-lucide="brain" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
  <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.4em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.2em 0.6em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #F2B5A8;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">overload</div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-style:italic;">
  context windows are a scarce resource — more info ≠ better answers
 </div>

</div>
```
